prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
observed_response: Copilot returned generic English error: 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' with [다시 시도] [피드백 보내기] buttons. No 보안 경고 / 차단 / PII warning text present in DOM.
notes: W0e Full 22 regression (pluggable handler dispatch wired at generate_block_response() entry, all 22 services handler_class=NULL → legacy path expected, 0 behavior delta). m365_copilot reproduces #1138/#1146 FAIL_NOT_RENDERED — same generic English fallback 'Something went wrong' with 다시 시도/피드백 보내기 buttons, no Korean '차단' string anywhere on the page. Suggests either engine intercept did not fire on m365_copilot (legacy path also failing post-pluggable wire-in) or upstream short-circuit before warning payload could be swapped. Consistent with prior Phase 6 recovery failure — m365_copilot likely still needs handler_class binding or a Wave 0 ResponseHandler exclusion. Hard reload completed, no PIN modal, prompt submitted via 보내기 button (id=52, coords 1543,556) after typing into 'Copilot에 메시지 보내기' contenteditable (id=35→49). 60s observation window confirmed no further DOM change.
